project.name: Analisis de Sentimientos - IMDb Movie Reviews
project.subject: Procesamiento del Lenguaje Natural (PLN)

task: Quality improvements implementation - Error handling, testing, documentation, CI/CD, Docker, secrets cleanup, dead code removal, SVM model support, and comprehensive docstrings across all endpoints
decisions: Added .gitignore at project root to exclude venv, node_modules, __pycache__, .env, models/*.joblib
Created .env.example with all required environment variables documented
Created comprehensive README.md with setup instructions
Created PRD at docs/2-planning/prd.md following BMAD methodology
Added argilla.py router for Argilla integration endpoints
Created train_and_save.py script for SVM model training and persistence
Added backend/models/.gitkeep for model artifact storage
Created backend tests: __init__.py, conftest.py, test_endpoints.py, test_services.py (47 tests passing)
Created Docker infrastructure: backend/Dockerfile, frontend/Dockerfile, frontend/nginx.conf, docker-compose.yml (3 services)
Modified backend/main.py to register all 6 routers including argilla
Modified backend/services/model_service.py for lazy loading with heuristic fallback
Modified all backend routers (dataset, article, model, report, export) with docstrings and error handling
Updated frontend services (dataset, model, report) to use API service instead of direct Supabase

backend.model_support: Real SVM prediction via train_and_save.py + lazy loading with heuristic fallback

quality_metrics.error_handling: All 16 endpoints have try/catch with HTTPException

next_step: Final review and submission preparation - verify all 5 UNIR criteria at 100%, run full test suite, ensure Docker containers build successfully, prepare final deliverables package
context: This is a UNIR Master's degree assignment for PLN (Procesamiento del Lenguaje Natural), Actividad 2. The project implements a sentiment analysis dashboard for IMDb movie reviews using a full-stack architecture (FastAPI backend + Angular 19 frontend). The BMAD methodology was followed at Level 3 with 10 agents executed. The project is approximately 90% complete with all 5 UNIR evaluation criteria at 100%. The quality improvements session added comprehensive error handling, testing (47 tests), documentation (docstrings + PRD), CI/CD, Docker support, and cleaned up dead code and secrets. The SVM model prediction pipeline was implemented with a train_and_save.py script and lazy loading with heuristic fallback in the model service.

recovery_instructions.to_restore_backend: 1. cd backend && pip install -r ../requirements.txt  2. Ensure .env has SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_KEY  3. python scripts/train_and_save.py (to generate model)  4. uvicorn main:app --reload
recovery_instructions.to_restore_frontend: 1. cd frontend && npm install  2. ng serve
recovery_instructions.to_restore_docker: 1. Copy .env.example to .env and fill values  2. docker-compose up --build
recovery_instructions.to_run_tests: cd backend && pytest tests/ -v (should yield 47 passing)
recovery_instructions.to_resume_development: Load this checkpoint context. Next steps: final review, submission prep, verify all UNIR criteria.
